overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through a severe storm at night. The scene features operational navigation displays including GPS, radar, and depth sounder, with the ship's bow cutting through rough seas as lightning strikes illuminate the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation controls overlooking bow

agents.ego_description: operating the ship through stormy seas while monitoring the radar and GPS navigation displays

entered.detail: blue-tinted electronic chart display showing vessel position and coastline
circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep showing nearby contacts
blue screen displaying water depth and bottom contour information
red-painted bow deck of the vessel with anchor equipment visible
silver metal safety railings along the edge of the bow deck
dark turbulent water with whitecaps and rolling waves

segments.scene_description: The camera is positioned inside a ship's bridge, looking out over the bow as it plows through rough, stormy seas at night. Three navigation screens display GPS, radar, and depth data while the vessel maintains steady course through the darkness, with waves crashing against the hull.

events.description: lightning bolt strikes the ocean ahead, briefly illuminating the storm clouds and waves with bright white light

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate through the storm as lightning illuminates the seascape ahead

entered.detail: bright electrical discharge striking the ocean surface ahead of the ship, illuminating the surrounding clouds

segments.scene_description: A sudden lightning strike illuminates the stormy seascape ahead, casting bright white light across the waves and clouds before the scene returns to darkness. The ship continues its course through the turbulent waters as the radar continues its sweep.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous view from a ship's bridge as a dark, stormy night is momentarily interrupted by a brilliant flash of lightning. It begins with the camera looking over the bow as the vessel plows through rough, turbulent seas, with the interior glow of GPS, radar, and depth screens contrasting against the surrounding darkness. As the ship maintains its steady course through the crashing waves, a sudden lightning strike erupts on the horizon, instantly transforming the seascape into a stark, bright white landscape of illuminated clouds and water. The scene then shifts back into deep shadow as the flash fades, leaving the ship to continue its journey through the storm while the radar continues its rhythmic sweep.
